location: Found on a corpse inside Stormveil Castle's guarded storage area. From the Secluded Cell Site of Grace, backtrack west and up the ramp past the Living Jars, cross to a wooden platform/ledge, follow it through the archways into a storage room, climb the stairs to the walkway above, then head into a larger storeroom full of Commoners — the shield is tucked under the second staircase there.
tactics: This is a different pickup from the Wooden Greatshield, which is found elsewhere in the same castle — grabbing one doesn't mean you already have the other.
The Living Jars along the route explode when approached; keep distance or bait them before crossing.
The storeroom holding the shield is full of Commoner enemies — clear or sneak past before looting under the stairs.
lore: A body-covering iron tower shield engraved with an image of the Roundtable Hold, the gathering place where Tarnished champions once convened.

builds.name: Strength greatshield turtle
builds.why: Solid all-around negation at a mid-tier 30 Strength requirement makes it an accessible full-block option early on.

builds.name: Guard-counter poke build
builds.why: Decent guard boost supports blocking through Stormveil's soldiers while countering with a spear.
